name: OurRevolution.com
subject: [Petition] Keith Ellison for DNC Chair
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
One of the next steps for our political revolution is just around the corner.
In February, members of the Democratic National Committee will vote on who will become the next DNC Chair. And Keith Ellison - the second member of Congress to endorse Bernie's campaign for president - is among those running for the post.
Keith has never been afraid of standing up to Wall Street, Big Oil, or any other special interest groups. He is committed to responding to everyday people, not the billionaire class.
Secretary of Labor Tom Perez recently announced he would also run for DNC Chair, entering as a challenger to Keith. The race has reached a turning point, and we need to make sure Keith keeps up the momentum.
**Last week Keith and Bernie announced a goal of collecting 1 million signatures to send a strong message that there's broad support for Keith to serve as the next DNC Chair. Will you help us get there?**
[**Sign our petition if you believe that Keith Ellison is the best choice to lead the Democratic National Committee and revitalize the Democratic Party.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/keith-ellison-dnc?source=em161219 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/keith-ellison-dnc?source=em161219")
With Keith Ellison leading the DNC, we will be able to transform the Democratic Party and ensure it works to advance the interests of working people.
Right now, the Democratic Party is undergoing a fundamental shift. November's election results have forced us to rethink our priorities and consider how we will move forward to make sure liberals come out strong in 2018 and take back the White House in 2020.
As a career organizer, Keith knows that voter turnout must be a top priority - not only during presidential elections, but in _every_ election. And as a representative from Minnesota, he has an in-depth understanding of the challenges facing the Midwest - including the set of circumstances that led voters in the region to turn out for Trump in large numbers.
Keith also knows what is at stake during a Trump presidency - for Muslims, people of color, the LGBTQ community, immigrants, and so many others. He was one of the only leaders who acknowledged early on Trump's potential to win the Republican nomination and the White House. His unique perspective and experience makes him the best choice to unify the party and lead the opposition to Trump.
[**Sign our petition if you believe that Keith Ellison is the best choice to lead the Democratic National Committee and revitalize the Democratic Party.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/keith-ellison-dnc?source=em161219 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/keith-ellison-dnc?source=em161219")
Keith Ellison is our best shot at creating a more progressive Democratic Party that is ready to take bold action to improve the lives of millions of Americans.
Let's show up when he needs us most - and that starts with reaching 1 million signatures endorsing his run for DNC Chair.
\- The team at Our Revolution
**[ADD YOUR NAME»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/keith-ellison-dnc?source=em161219 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/keith-ellison-dnc?source=em161219")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Democrats.org
subject: ✨ Our 2016 holiday card for the Obamas ✨
body:
The winning holiday card for the Obamas!
---
**The votes have been counted, and here's the winning 2016 holiday card design! Now, sign the card for the First Family:

** **[SIGN THE CARD](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Sign-the-Holiday-Card1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+SIGN+THE+CARD&utm_campaign=em_20161220_my_f&source=em_20161220_my_f")**
Hi --

My team had a great time coming up with designs for this year's holiday card for the Obamas.

More than 40,000 (!) supporters voted, and -- by a huge margin -- here's the winner:

[](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Sign-the-Holiday-Card1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20161220_my_f&source=em_20161220_my_f")
This is the very last holiday card we'll send to the Obamas before the President leaves office, and you only have a few days left before we send it to them.

**Sign our holiday card for the Obama family now:**

**[http://my.democrats.org/Sign-the-Holiday-Card](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/Sign-the-Holiday-Card1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+httpmydemocratsorgSigntheHolidayCard&utm_campaign=em_20161220_my_f&source=em_20161220_my_f")**

Thanks so much for helping us send season's greetings to the First Family.

Meena

Meena Yi
Art Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c27f/4067b0a/22d8a6a31/7e062e9c/3414225565/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161220_my_f&source=em_20161220_my_f"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c27f/4067b0a/22d8a6a31/7e062e9d/3414225565/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161220_my_f&source=em_20161220_my_f"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c27f/4067b0a/22d8a6a31/7e062e9a/3414225565/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161220_my_f&source=em_20161220_my_f") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c27f/4067b0a/22d8a6a31/7e062e9b/3414225565/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161220_my_f&source=em_20161220_my_f"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Reince=20Priebus=2C=20Chairman?=
subject: 2017 priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Friend, our victories in 2016 are a testament to your selfless commitment... |

Friend, yesterday, thanks to your loyal dedication to our Party and the movement to Make America Great Again, the Electoral College officially voted to make Donald J. Trump the President-elect. One month from today, Mr. Trump will be sworn in as America’s 45th President and will lead our Party, with majorities in both the House and Senate, because of the strong campaigns we were able to run with your support.
Thank you! While we celebrate our victories, we must remember this election was just the first step to getting America back on track. The Democrats have made it clear they will adamantly oppose Mr. Trump’s America First agenda of creating new jobs, cutting the bureaucratic red-tape, securing our borders, and strengthening our national defense. Friend, to get a head start on 2017 and show President-elect Trump and our Congressional majorities that you are ready to keep winning, I’m asking you to please make a special contribution of $25, $35, $50, $100 or even $200 today. We must secure the funds to carry the momentum forward and rebuild our Party’s war chest for the battles ahead. From all my experience working with President-elect Trump I know he is the leader we need to unite our country... ...but I also know he needs you by his side to get our message out. Your generous donation today will provide the resources to get our common sense, conservative message past the liberal media filter so we can inform Americans about our policies to restore our nation’s prosperity, security, and freedom. Please make a contribution of $25, $35, $50, $100 or even $200 right away so we can put it to work immediately. I look forward to continuing to work with you, Friend. Thank you and God Bless, Reince Priebus Chairman, Republican National Committee
THANK YOU

Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecbba20fBAGDIkCGyWgaB01gDRMN6aaaaB01gBMFTGYma?t=3@52227&f=cqvjkmht58_fnZjk.dnn&k=c&w=
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of the Republican National Committee's online community. If you have any questions, concerns, or thoughts on the Republican Party, just click here to send us a message! If you'd like more information on the GOP platform or to volunteer, visit gop.com. Getting emails from the RNC is one of the best ways to stay up-to-date on our fight to take back the White House, but if you really want to scale back, click here to receive less email or click here to unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the GOP on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. Thank you for all that you do to help elect a conservative president.

Friend, to get a head start on 2017 and show President-elect Trump and our Congressional majorities that you are ready to keep winning, I’m asking you to please make a special contribution of $25, $35, $50, $100 or even $200 today.

name: Barack Obama
subject: I'll ask personally, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We've heard a lot about what Democrats should do next. I wanted to take a minute and talk about why that's important...
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab0?refcode=DPE-20161220-Obama-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend -- We've heard a lot about what Democrats should do next. I wanted to take a minute and talk about why that's important.

When I think back to my community organizing days, fighting for tenants' rights and tutoring programs on the south side of Chicago, my memories aren't filled with quick victories. I think of exhausting days, hard conversations, and lots of times when despite our efforts, things didn't go our way.

Now I won't lie: It was hard to keep going after some of those losses. **But what gave me hope was the belief that next time could be different -- that even in defeat, the good guys had moved the ball forward.**

Of course "next time" wasn't always different. But we owed it to everyone whose lives hung on these fights to try -- because if we didn't, "next time" would never be different.

There's a lot last month that didn't go our way, but we moved the ball forward all the same. When the Senate meets in January, more people of color -- including four women -- will stand in its ranks than ever before. And because of the work you did to get them there, we'll be that much closer to a government that reflects the rich potential of its people.

[**Now 's not the time to quit. Now's the time to get off the mat and make sure what we've accomplished is only the beginning. Will you join me and help the DSCC do it, Friend?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab0?refcode=DPE-20161220-Obama-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

I don't know what the next four years have in store. But I do know it's never been more important to defend what's right. **If we are going to deliver a better future for America, we can 't let cynicism control the present.**

Democrats must pick ourselves up and re-focus on the work that needs doing -- no matter how hard it gets. I know it isn't easy, but it's important. **And it can 't happen without you.**

**So I 'll ask personally, Friend: Will you pitch in to help the DSCC move the ball forward in 2017 and beyond?**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab0?refcode=DPE-20161220-Obama-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&employer=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab0?refcode=DPE-20161220-Obama-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&employer=&amount=5")

[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab0?refcode=DPE-20161220-Obama-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&employer=&amount=15")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab0?refcode=DPE-20161220-Obama-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&employer=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab0?refcode=DPE-20161220-Obama-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&employer=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab0?refcode=DPE-20161220-Obama-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thanks for everything,
Barack Obama

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eeb5/2b07114c/4138d7ba/7368caaa/761969259/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eeb5/2b07114c/4138d7ba/7368caa5/761969259/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eeb5/2b07114c/4138d7ba/7368caa4/761969259/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

I think of exhausting days, hard conversations, and lots of times when despite our efforts, things didn't go our way. Now I won't lie: It was hard to keep going after some of those losses. But what gave me hope was the belief that next time could be different -- that even in defeat, the good guys had moved the ball forward. Of course "next time" wasn't always different. But we owed it to everyone whose lives hung on these fights to try -- because if we didn't, "next time" would never be different. There's a lot last month that didn't go our way, but we moved the ball forward all the same. When the Senate meets in January, more people of color -- including four women -- will stand in its ranks than ever before. And because of the work you did to get them there, we'll be that much closer to a government that reflects the rich potential of its people. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" I don't know what the next four years have in store. But I do know it's never been more important to defend what's right. If we are going to deliver a better future for America, we can 't let cynicism control the present. Democrats must pick ourselves up and re-focus on the work that needs doing -- no matter how hard it gets. I know it isn't easy, but it's important. And it can 't happen without you. So I 'll ask personally, Friend: Will you pitch in to help the DSCC move the ball forward in 2017 and beyond? "" "" "" "" "" "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Thanks for everything, Barack Obama Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee 120 Maryland Ave. NE Washington, DC 20002 Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values. If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, "". If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please "". Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please "". We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

body:

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c272/4067b0a/22dbaf201/7e061cf1/1712058304/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161220_dnc2_v5s2&source=em_20161220_dnc2_v5s2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c272/4067b0a/22dbaf201/7e061cfe/1712058304/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161220_dnc2_v5s2&source=em_20161220_dnc2_v5s2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c272/4067b0a/22dbaf201/7e061cff/1712058304/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161220_dnc2_v5s2&source=em_20161220_dnc2_v5s2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c272/4067b0a/22dbaf201/7e061cfc/1712058304/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161220_dnc2_v5s2&source=em_20161220_dnc2_v5s2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: Caitlin Mitchell, EMILY's List
subject: Members' choice: Pick our official 2017 Membership Card >>
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77f4/24c69fd9/cf2aa7/18ef75fa/4094895022/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPENRX21N_digital_email_20161220_MemCardVote_n-all&source=WPENRX21N_digital_email_20161220_MemCardVote_n-all")
---

Peter,

It's that time of year: 2016 EMILY's List memberships are expiring, and we're about to launch our 2017 membership drive!

But before we ask you to become a member, we're doing something a little different. We want you to pick what our 2017 Membership Card should look like.

**[Vote for your favorite card design-- then make a donation to become a member and get the winner.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77f4/24c69fd9/cf2aa7/18ef75fb/4094895022/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20161216_email_cardvote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Vote+for+your+favorite+card+design+mdash&utm_campaign=WPENRX21N_digital_email_20161220_MemCardVote_n-all&source=WPENRX21N_digital_email_20161220_MemCardVote_n-all")**
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77f4/24c69fd9/cf2aa7/18ef75f4/4094895022/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20161216_email_cardvote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WPENRX21N_digital_email_20161220_MemCardVote_n-all&source=WPENRX21N_digital_email_20161220_MemCardVote_n-all")
We came up with a few designs we liked while brainstorming our 2017 Membership Card, but we couldn't pick just one. So we're turning it over to this community.

I'm super curious to see which one's your favorite.

**Have your say for the 2017 EMILY's List Membership Card design -- and then become a member to reserve yours early:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Pick-Your-Favorite-Design](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77f4/24c69fd9/cf2aa7/18ef75f5/4094895022/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20161216_email_cardvote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgPickYourFavorite&utm_campaign=WPENRX21N_digital_email_20161220_MemCardVote_n-all&source=WPENRX21N_digital_email_20161220_MemCardVote_n-all")**

Thanks for your thoughts,

Caitlin Mitchell
Vice President of Digital, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77f4/24c69fd9/cf2aa7/18ef75f6/4094895022/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161219_email_Membership17-upsell?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WPENRX21N_digital_email_20161220_MemCardVote_n-all&source=WPENRX21N_digital_email_20161220_MemCardVote_n-all")

\---
If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline to become a 2017 member, thank you! It can take several days to process memberships, but don't worry, we have it recorded.

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77f4/24c69fd9/cf2aa7/18ef75f7/4094895022/VEsA/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WPENRX21N_digital_email_20161220_MemCardVote_n-all&source=WPENRX21N_digital_email_20161220_MemCardVote_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77f4/24c69fd9/cf2aa7/18ef75f0/4094895022/VEsB/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WPENRX21N_digital_email_20161220_MemCardVote_n-all&source=WPENRX21N_digital_email_20161220_MemCardVote_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77f4/24c69fd9/cf2aa7/18ef75f1/4094895022/VEsO/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=WPENRX21N_digital_email_20161220_MemCardVote_n-all&source=WPENRX21N_digital_email_20161220_MemCardVote_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

subject: JUST IN: (from President Obama)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
President Obama's message this morning couldn't be more urgent. He's counting on Democrats to step up and protect our progress before it's too late... [](https://secure.dscc. **A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. 120 Maryland Ave. NE

and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eebd/2b07114c/41157246/736835d3/1025013334/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eebd/2b07114c/41157246/736835cd/1025013334/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
